purpose: Exact command deck for turning the current Codex/Flywheel local-model roadmap into metadata receipts and later benchmark evidence.
guards: Commands in metadata_only may generate local JSON/Markdown artifacts but must not call model providers.
Commands in metadata_only must not probe live endpoints.
Commands in metadata_only must not read model weights.
Commands in requires_validation_approval need explicit approval before running tests or validation.
Commands in requires_provider_endpoint_approval need explicit approval before calling providers, local endpoints, Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex Pro, or frontier APIs.
No command may print secrets, .env values, tokens, credentials, private keys, or sensitive payload bodies.

commands.purpose: Print the delegated dry-plan command without executing the closed-loop seed.
Generate the closed-loop command plan without executing child benchmark/provider steps.
Record non-secret Claude/Codex account lane posture without signing in or reading token stores.
Generate the non-executing dry/focused/full benchmark matrix.
commands.command: python scripts/run_benchmark_execution_matrix.py --providers serve,codex,ollama,claude,opencode,dry --run-id benchmark_matrix_20260709 --artifact-dir C:/tmp/harness_benchmark_matrix_20260709 --out C:/tmp/benchmark_execution_matrix_20260709.json --markdown-out C:/tmp/benchmark_execution_matrix_20260709.md --store-root C:/tmp/harness_file_store

commands.purpose: Check closed-loop schematic graph/report drift without running tests, benchmarks, endpoints, or providers.
Generate the benchmark contract, provider roles, metric weights, dataset lanes, and existing artifact inventory.
Inventory configured context roots without reading secrets into model context.
Generate static readiness receipts for mneme, relay, and plexus.
commands.command: python scripts/run_tool_readiness_receipts.py --tools mneme,relay,plexus --base-root C:/dev/public --out C:/tmp/tool_readiness_20260709.json --markdown-out C:/tmp/tool_readiness_20260709.md --store-root C:/tmp/harness_file_store

commands.purpose: Turn tool readiness into a hardening plan.
commands.command: python scripts/run_tool_hardening_plan.py --readiness-artifact C:/tmp/tool_readiness_20260709.json --out C:/tmp/tool_hardening_plan_20260709.json --markdown-out C:/tmp/tool_hardening_plan_20260709.md --store-root C:/tmp/harness_file_store

commands.purpose: Profile local model endpoint configuration without probing generation or reading weights.
Join cross-harness adapter roles with endpoint profile metadata without provider calls or endpoint probes.
Generate static gather/source-intake readiness receipts.
commands.command: python scripts/run_gather_readiness.py --gather-root C:/dev/public/gather --config-roots C:/dev/local-model/configs --config-pattern "gather-*.json" --credential-vars GATHER_DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN,DISCORD_TOKEN --out C:/tmp/gather_readiness_20260709.json --markdown-out C:/tmp/gather_readiness_20260709.md --store-root C:/tmp/harness_file_store

commands.purpose: Use the local Index fallback receipt while MCP index.context.envelope is unavailable.
commands.command: python scripts/run_index_receipt.py --lane context-envelope --root C:/dev --index-root C:/dev/public/index --budget 12000 --focus "local-model harness benchmark task set endpoint tools" --hops 2 --artifact-out C:/tmp/index_context_envelope_fallback_20260709.json --out C:/tmp/index_context_envelope_fallback_receipt_20260709.json --store-root C:/tmp/harness_file_store

commands.purpose: Generate the non-executing custom agentic task manifest with prompt hashes, planned artifacts, and dry/null scorecard rows.
Generate the non-executing cross-harness manifest with same-task prompt hashes and provider-role receipt plans.
Generate the non-executing embodied realtime multimodal plan with planned probes and dry scorecard rows.
Generate the non-executing model-card claim table for embodied realtime model leads before any result claims.
Targeted validation slice for metadata-only manifest and closed-loop wiring.
commands.command: pytest tests/test_agentic_task_set_manifest.py tests/test_cross_harness_manifest.py tests/test_adapter_runtime_matrix.py tests/test_embodied_realtime_multimodal_plan.py tests/test_model_card_claim_table.py tests/test_schematic_drift_check.py tests/test_harness_cli.py tests/test_closed_loop_benchmark_seed.py tests/test_benchmark_execution_matrix.py tests/test_benchmark_profile_coverage.py tests/test_closed_loop_outcome_report.py

commands.purpose: Probe local 14B/32B endpoint health and one fixed generation in non-strict mode.
Run the focused closed-loop seed after metadata preflights and endpoint policy are approved.
Generate outcome synthesis from the focused closed-loop seed artifacts.

known_risks: index.index_context_envelope currently fails with Transport closed in the MCP surface.
metadata preflight commands are implemented but not executed by this deck record.
metadata preflights are not benchmark results and do not prove model quality.
endpoint and provider commands require separate approval before execution.
